title: Provide overview of sales & analytics for all apps on a single page
excerpt: The recent changes to sales & analytics are great, but very cumbersome if you have 16 apps. It also doesn’t help that the UX is an SPA that does not adhere to native navigation which means that you can’t cmd+click on an …

posts.author: remie (Remie Bolte)
posts.cookedHtml:
The recent changes to sales & analytics are great, but very cumbersome if you have 16 apps. It also doesn’t help that the UX is an SPA that does not adhere to native navigation which means that you can’t cmd+click on an app to open it in a new window. This results in 3 clicks per app to see the sales and go back to the main menu.

So A) please make the UX more navigation friendly, and B) please add a way for us to see analytics & sales for all apps in a single view.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the feedback @remie !!
